resources.string: This sample demonstrates some features of Rules Engine in the Verint SDK. Follow the instructions below to check eligibility.

Page views criteria is the number of activities that the user must view in a single app session before they are eligible to be invited to participate in this measure’s survey. This count is reset when the app is removed from memory. 

In this sample, the invite will be triggered after 3 page views. 

Note that the required number of page views may have already been reached before opening this page, e.g. through opening and reopening the app without the app being removed from memory.

Launch count criteria is the number of times the app is launched before the user is eligible for an invitation to participate in this measure’s survey. In this sample, the invite will be triggered after 5 launch counts. Please try to background/foreground the app 3 times.

Properties are key-value pairs that define values from your app that a story step can check against. You are responsible for informing the SDK when the custom events occur through calls to the StoryEngine.setIntProperty() method (or related methods). In this sample, the invite is triggered by incrementing the "custom_property" property 3 times.
Once the invite is shown, the SDK drops into an idle state until the repeat days have elapsed. Use this button to reset the state of the SDK.
Can we send you a brief survey?
